title: Strumaria merxmuelleriana
taxonomy: Strumaria merxmuelleriana is classified in the kingdom Plantae, phylum Tracheophyta, class Liliopsida, order Asparagales, and family Amaryllidaceae. This classification indicates its position within the plant kingdom, showing its relationships to other plants. As a member of the Amaryllidaceae family, it shares characteristics with other flowering plants in this group. The order Asparagales and class Liliopsida further refine its classification, highlighting its similarity to other monocots. This classification provides a framework for understanding the evolutionary history and relationships of Strumaria merxmuelleriana.
